历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking was approximately 27,224, and in 2025, it was approximately 31,557, with a decline of about 4,333 places over two years, indicating a significant drop in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 31,557. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jilin Province was 1 student in 2024, 4 in 2025, and 4 in 2026. After the expansion in 2025, the plan remains unchanged in 2026, and the expansion effect has already been reflected in the previous year's ranking decline.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science main list has been declining: 189th in 2022, 192nd in 2024, 195th in 2025, and not in the top 200 in 2026, showing a downward trend. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 30th (relatively popular), with high short video exposure, but no major positive or negative public opinion events were found in the reputation documents. There is no record of admission cut-off gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are no disciplines rated A- or above, indicating relatively limited disciplinary competitiveness. Among the enrollment majors, Economics and Taxation belong to the Finance and Economics category (differentiated and wait-and-see), Transportation belongs to the Civil Engineering category (differentiated and wait-and-see), and Pharmacy belongs to the Biology, Chemistry, and Environment category (generally wait-and-see). Overall, the popularity of majors is neutral. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Jilin Province in 2026 is about 79,825, a slight decrease of about 596 from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition pressure.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Tibet University is located in Lhasa, far from Jilin Province geographically, with significant differences in climate and living environment. This poses a certain regional barrier for examinees from Jilin, but its 211 status still holds appeal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant decline in rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the continuous decline in university rankings, a slight decrease in the total number of examinees, and neutral major popularity, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will ease slightly, with rankings declining slightly from the 2025 baseline of 31,557. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 31,757, with a range of 31,257 to 32,257.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 31,257–32,257, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Transportation as the main choice, with Tier 1 Taxation and Economics as reach options, and Tier 3 Pharmacy as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<31,257), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors.
